def apply_discount(order):
    is_vip = order.customer.tier == "vip"
    is_high_value = order.total > 500
    is_available = not order.item.backordered

    if is_vip and is_high_value and is_available:
        order.discount = order.total * 0.1
    else:
        order.discount = 0


def determine_shipping(order):
    is_vip = order.customer.tier == "vip"
    is_priority = order.item.priority
    is_domestic = order.shipping_zone == "domestic"

    if is_vip and is_priority:
        order.shipping = "express_free" if is_domestic else "express_discounted"
    else:
        order.shipping = "standard"


def process_order(order):
    apply_discount(order)
    determine_shipping(order)
    return order
